title: Selectors, Cardinality, Unknown Values, and Typed Extraction · Compiler Case: Drift Detection
summary: A broad selector takes the first node, missing and empty values collapse together, strings are cast into domain types, and markup drift silently corrupts output. Predict authorization, URL identity, runtime admission, Promise ownership, resource bounds, accessibility impact, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source.
